summary: POTUS retweet of the WhiteHouse video: a cinematic, color-graded (teal-and-amber, letterboxed, lens-flared) montage set to music. A presidential motorcade glides past the Washington Monument at golden hour, then cuts to blue-collar construction crews (hard hats, an 'MID-AMERICA' trailer, Atoka OK) lined up to meet Trump, who walks the line in a long coat and poses with the workers giving thumbs-up, ending on a black title card. Framed in the tweet as 'Restoring the Reflecting Pool,' it is really a stylized hero-of-American-labor spectacle. The film-grade grading, widescreen framing, and music bed make it a youth-appeal produced piece glorifying Trump and American workers.

script.scene: Wide cinematic shot, teal/amber color grade and lens flare: a black SUV presidential motorcade rolls across an open plaza with the Washington Monument behind it at golden hour. Music-driven, no speech.
Cut to a moodily-lit lineup of bearded construction/labor workers in hard hats and work shirts, standing shoulder to shoulder facing camera under an 'America'-branded banner.
Low-angle shot of Trump in a dark long coat and suit standing before the line of workers; their dusty boots and jeans fill the frame beside a black Cadillac SUV. Dim cinematic tone.
Group hero shot in front of a 'MID-AMERICA / Atoka, OK' equipment trailer: Trump in red tie centered, surrounded by the work crew giving thumbs-up and smiling.
Black end title card with faint text, closing the montage.

notable_text: RT @WhiteHouse: 'Restoring the Reflecting Pool. Making D.C. beautiful again!'
